methylTracer 0.99.8
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Call differentially methylated regions (DMRs) using the turbo algorithm

Source: R/calldmrs_turbo.R
calldmrs_turbo.Rd

Identify differentially methylated regions (DMRs) from a methylTracer object using the C++ turbo DMR-calling backend. The function uses per-CpG test statistics and p-values stored in the HDF5 file (under "/uns/dmrs_results") to detect contiguous regions enriched for significant CpG sites.

calldmrs_turbo(
  met = NULL,
  p_threshold = 0.05,
  minlen = 50L,
  minCG = 3L,
  dis_merge = 100,
  pct_sig = 0.1,
  sep = 5000,
  case_group = NULL,
  ctrl_group = NULL
)

Arguments

met

A methylTracer object containing region-level methylation data and a reference to the underlying HDF5 file. The object must have been processed with pre_calldmrs beforehand.

p_threshold

Numeric scalar. Per-CpG p-value threshold used by the turbo algorithm to define “significant” CpGs (default: 0.05).

minlen

Integer scalar. Minimum DMR length in base pairs (default: 50).

minCG

Integer scalar. Minimum number of CpG sites required for a region to be considered a DMR (default: 3).

dis_merge

Numeric scalar. Maximum distance (in base pairs) between adjacent significant segments within a region to be merged into a single DMR (default: 100).

pct_sig

Numeric scalar between 0 and 1. Minimum fraction of CpG sites within a candidate region that must pass the p_threshold to retain the region (default: 0.1).

sep

Numeric scalar. Genomic distance (in base pairs) used to split the genome into independent windows for bump finding (default: 5000).

case_group

Character scalar. Label of the case group in the sample metadata (default: "case"). Used only to rename region-level mean methylation columns in the output.

ctrl_group

Character scalar. Label of the control group in the sample metadata (default: "ctrl").

Value

A GRanges object with one row per DMR. The metadata columns include:

  • nCG: number of CpG sites in the region.

  • md: mean methylation difference (mean_<case_group> - mean_<ctrl_group>).

  • dmrs_length: region length in base pairs.

  • mean_<case_group>: mean methylation proportion (0–1) in the case group across the region.

  • mean_<ctrl_group>: mean methylation proportion (0–1) in the control group across the region.

  • areaStat: sum of per-CpG test statistics within the region, reflecting both effect size and consistency.

If no DMRs are detected, an empty GRanges object is returned.

Details

This function is intended to be run after pre_calldmrs, which computes per-CpG statistics (means, variances, t-statistics, p-values, FDR) and stores them as a table in "/uns/dmrs_results" in the underlying HDF5 file.

Internally, the function:

  1. Reads "/uns/dmrs_results" from the HDF5 file attached to met.

  2. Converts the table to a data frame and assigns standard column names (chr, pos, mu1, mu2, diff, diff.se, stat, pval, fdr).

  3. Calls the C++ routine calldmrs_turbo to group CpGs into candidate regions based on the p-value threshold and genomic distance rules, and to compute region-level statistics: mean methylation in each group, methylation difference, and area statistic (sum of per-CpG test statistics).

  4. Returns a GRanges object with DMR coordinates and associated statistics.

Methylation values are assumed to be stored as proportions in \([0, 1]\). Region-level mean methylation columns in the return object are renamed to mean_<case_group> and mean_<ctrl_group> for convenience.

See also

pre_calldmrs for generating the per-CpG statistics that this function consumes.

Examples

# \donttest{
output_dir <- tempdir()

sam_info_df <- data.frame(
  sample_name = paste0("sample_", 1:8),
  group       = c(rep("case", 4), rep("ctrl", 4)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
sam_info <- file.path(output_dir, "sample_info.csv")

## toy methylation matrix (proportions 0–1)
input_file_df <- data.frame(
  marker_name = c(
    "chr1_1000_2000", "chr1_2000_3000",
    "chr1_3000_4000", "chr1_4000_5000"
  ),
  sample_1    = c(0.10, 0.20, 0.60, 0.90),
  sample_2    = c(0.10, 0.20, 0.60, 0.90),
  sample_3    = c(0.10, 0.20, 0.60, 0.90),
  sample_4    = c(0.10, 0.20, 0.60, 0.90),
  sample_5    = c(0.80, 0.90, 0.10, 0.05),
  sample_6    = c(0.80, 0.90, 0.10, 0.05),
  sample_7    = c(0.80, 0.90, 0.10, 0.05),
  sample_8    = c(0.80, 0.90, 0.10, 0.05)
)
input_file <- file.path(output_dir, "methylTracer_1kb.txt")

annotation_file_df <- data.frame(
  chr         = rep("chr1", 4),
  start       = c(1000L, 2000L, 3000L, 4000L),
  end         = c(2000L, 3000L, 4000L, 5000L),
  SYMBOL      = c("gene1", "gene2", "gene3", "gene4"),
  marker_name = c(
    "chr1_1000_2000", "chr1_2000_3000",
    "chr1_3000_4000", "chr1_4000_5000"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
annotation_file <- file.path(output_dir, "annotation.bed")

output_file <- "methylTracer_obj_test.h5"

unlink(file.path(output_dir, output_file), recursive = TRUE)

write.csv(sam_info_df, sam_info, row.names = FALSE)
write.table(input_file_df, input_file,
            sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
write.table(annotation_file_df, annotation_file,
            sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

build_h5(
  sam_info       = sam_info,
  input_file     = input_file,
  output_dir     = output_dir,
  output_file    = output_file,
  annotation_file = annotation_file
)
#> writing X dataset
#> 
  |                                                                            
  |                                                                      |   0%
  |                                                                            
  |======================================================================| 100%
#> Successfully created HDF5 file: /tmp/RtmpRfaB9m/methylTracer_obj_test.h5

met <- build_met_obj(
  file.path(output_dir, output_file),
  sample_name = "sample_name",
  marker_name = "marker_name"
)

pre_res <- pre_calldmrs(
  met           = met,
  group_colname = "group",
  case_group    = "case",
  control_group = "ctrl"
)
#> Saving results in /var/stat_results
#> Saving filtered results in /uns/dmrs_results

dmr_res <- calldmrs_turbo(
  met         = met,
  p_threshold = 0.05,
  case_group  = "case",
  ctrl_group  = "ctrl"
)
#> 
#> Total CG sites: 4
#> DMRs detected: 1
#> Elapsed time: 0.00 seconds
# }
